name: Peas Potato & Eggplant Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and cut potatoes into small pieces (ideally 16 sections per potato).
2. Cut eggplant into thin slices, about 2 to 3 inches long.
3. Place the eggplant in water.
4. Blend garlic cloves, ginger, dried chili or chili powder, and onion with 2 tablespoons of water until a thick mixture is formed.
5. Place a cooking pot over low heat and add oil.
6. Add turmeric powder and blended spices to the pot.
7. When the spices become relatively thick, add potatoes and mix thoroughly. Cover with the lid.
8. Cook for 3 minutes.
9. Add sliced eggplant and mix again. Pour in 1/2 cup of water and return the lid.
10. Cook for an additional 8 minutes. Check to ensure the vegetables do not burn at the bottom.
11. Add peas and salt, then mix all ingredients together. Replace the lid and continue cooking for 4 to 9 minutes until the eggplant is soft.
12. Turn off the heat and mix once more. Serve hot or warm.
